parameters.query:
-- Find LinkedIn contacts with no response after 7 days
-- who have valid email but aren't in SmartLead yet
SELECT 
  c.id as contact_id,
  c.email,
  c.first_name,
  c.last_name,
  c.company,
  c.job_title,
  cc.id as campaign_contact_id,
  ccc_li.current_message_sent_at as last_linkedin_message_at,
  'linkedin_to_email' as escalation_type
FROM contacts c
JOIN campaign_contacts cc ON c.id = cc.contact_id
JOIN campaign_contact_channels ccc_li ON ccc_li.campaign_contact_id = cc.id 
  AND ccc_li.campaign_channel_id = 'cc111111-2222-3333-4444-555566667777'  -- LinkedIn channel
LEFT JOIN campaign_contact_channels ccc_sl ON ccc_sl.campaign_contact_id = cc.id 
  AND ccc_sl.campaign_channel_id = 'cc222222-3333-4444-5555-666677778888'  -- SmartLead channel
WHERE cc.campaign_id = 'a1b2c3d4-e5f6-7890-abcd-ef1234567890'
  AND cc.status = 'active'
  AND ccc_li.status = 'active'
  AND ccc_li.has_replied = FALSE
  AND ccc_li.current_message_sent_at < NOW() - INTERVAL '7 days'
  AND c.email IS NOT NULL
  AND c.email != ''
  AND COALESCE(c.email_validation_result, 'unknown') IN ('valid', 'catch_all')
  AND ccc_sl.id IS NULL  -- Not yet in SmartLead
LIMIT 50

-- Find Email contacts with no response after 14 days
-- who have phone numbers and are engaged (opened/clicked) but haven't replied
SELECT 
  c.id as contact_id,
  c.phone,
  c.first_name,
  c.last_name,
  c.company,
  c.job_title,
  c.email,
  cc.id as campaign_contact_id,
  ccc_sl.current_message_sent_at as last_email_sent_at,
  ccc_sl.engagement_level,
  ccc_sl.last_email_opened_at,
  'email_to_phone' as escalation_type
FROM contacts c
JOIN campaign_contacts cc ON c.id = cc.contact_id
JOIN campaign_contact_channels ccc_sl ON ccc_sl.campaign_contact_id = cc.id 
  AND ccc_sl.campaign_channel_id = 'cc222222-3333-4444-5555-666677778888'  -- SmartLead channel
LEFT JOIN campaign_contact_channels ccc_ph ON ccc_ph.campaign_contact_id = cc.id 
  AND ccc_ph.campaign_channel_id = 'cc333333-4444-5555-6666-777788889999'  -- Phone channel
WHERE cc.campaign_id = 'a1b2c3d4-e5f6-7890-abcd-ef1234567890'
  AND cc.status = 'active'
  AND ccc_sl.status = 'active'
  AND ccc_sl.has_replied = FALSE
  AND ccc_sl.current_message_sent_at < NOW() - INTERVAL '14 days'
  AND ccc_sl.engagement_level IN ('warm', 'engaged')  -- Only call warm/engaged contacts
  AND c.phone IS NOT NULL
  AND c.phone != ''
  AND (ccc_ph.id IS NULL OR ccc_ph.call_attempts < 2)  -- Not yet called or < 2 attempts
LIMIT 25

nodes.name: Find Engaged Email Non-Responders with Phone

parameters.query:
=-- Add LinkedIn non-responders to SmartLead channel
INSERT INTO campaign_contact_channels (campaign_contact_id, campaign_channel_id, status)
VALUES 
  {{ $json.values }}
ON CONFLICT (campaign_contact_id, campaign_channel_id) DO UPDATE SET
  status = 'pending',
  updated_at = NOW()

=-- Log LinkedIn → Email escalation activity
INSERT INTO campaign_activity (campaign_contact_id, activity_type, channel, metadata)
SELECT 
  unnest(ARRAY{{ JSON.stringify($('Format LinkedIn Escalations').first().json.contact_ids.map(c => c.campaign_contact_id)) }}::uuid[]),
  'status_changed',
  'system',
  jsonb_build_object(
    'action', 'escalated_to_email',
    'reason', 'no_linkedin_response_7_days',
    'escalation_batch', '{{ $now.toISO() }}'
  )

=-- Add engaged non-responders to Phone channel
INSERT INTO campaign_contact_channels (campaign_contact_id, campaign_channel_id, status)
VALUES 
  {{ $json.values }}
ON CONFLICT (campaign_contact_id, campaign_channel_id) DO UPDATE SET
  status = 'pending',
  updated_at = NOW()

=-- Log Email → Phone escalation activity
INSERT INTO campaign_activity (campaign_contact_id, activity_type, channel, metadata)
SELECT 
  unnest(ARRAY{{ JSON.stringify($('Format Phone Escalations').first().json.contact_ids.map(c => c.campaign_contact_id)) }}::uuid[]),
  'status_changed',
  'system',
  jsonb_build_object(
    'action', 'escalated_to_phone',
    'reason', 'engaged_no_reply_14_days',
    'escalation_batch', '{{ $now.toISO() }}'
  )

parameters.jsonOutput:
={
  "linkedin_to_email_count": {{ $('Format LinkedIn Escalations').first()?.json?.count || 0 }},
  "email_to_phone_count": {{ $('Format Phone Escalations').first()?.json?.count || 0 }},
  "call_queue": {{ JSON.stringify($('Format Phone Escalations').first()?.json?.call_queue || []) }},
  "timestamp": "{{ $now.toISO() }}",
  "campaign": "Alumni Reconnect Q1 2026"
}

main.node: Find Engaged Email Non-Responders with Phone
